chapter_title.en: Reward of reciting Surah Ha Mim Sajdah

text: بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ عَنْ أَبِی الْمَعْزَاءِ عَنْ ذَرِیحٍ الْمُحَارِبِیِّ قَالَ قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع مَنْ قَرَأَ حم السَّجْدَهَ کَانَتْ لَهُ نُوراً یَوْمَ الْقِیَامَهِ مَدَّ بَصَرِهِ وَ سُرُوراً وَ عَاشَ فِی الدُّنْیَا مَحْمُوداً مَغْبُوطاً.

en.sayed-athar-husain-rizvi-&-sayed-maqs: 1.  Imam Ja’far Sadiq (a.s.) said, “One who recites Surah Ha Mim Sajdah this Surah would be a cause of happiness for him on the Day of Judgment and it would provide him such a light, which will be present as long as an eye can see. He would have a good life in this world and would be loved by others.”
